channel.title: February on Dasher
channel.description: Recent content in February on Dasher

item.title: February 2026 Reading
item.description:
Fiction

  1. William Frederik Hermans, An Untouched House (1950)
  2. Tarjei Vesaas, The Ice Palace (1963)
  3. Seicho Matsumoto, Tokyo Express (1958)
  4. Soraya Antonius, The Lord (1986)
  5. Tarjei Vesaas, The Birds (1957)

Non-Fiction

  1. Jonathan C. Slaght, Tigers Between Empires: The Improbable Return of Great Cats to the Forests of Russia and China (2025)
